title: 7 Logging in to FX Drafts
body_text:
7 	Logging in to FX Drafts
7.1	Overview of Logging in to FX Drafts
To access FX Drafts, the individual must be set up on both of the following:
Client Centre
â The individual must be a Security Officer with access to the FX Drafts application. See Chapter 6, FX Drafts User Management, for more information.
FX Drafts
â A user with admin permissions can set up other usersâ permissions within the FX Drafts application. See the FX Drafts Guide for CU Admin Users, Form 9182, for procedures.
7.2	Logging in to FX Drafts
To log in to FX Drafts:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
FX Drafts.
See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing FX Drafts
Enter the branch name in the âAct on Behalf ofâ field. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Branch Selection
Caution
:	Always log off when you step away from your desk or when you are finished using FX Drafts.
7.3	Resources for FX Drafts Procedures
The following two user guides are provided by Convera and distributed via the Payment Solutions Manual for your convenience:
FX Drafts Guide for CU Admin Users, Form 9182 â Provides procedures for FX Drafts Users with admin permission on defining permissions and managing other users within the FX Drafts application.
FX Drafts Guide for Order Creator Users, Form 9183 â Provides procedures for FX Drafts Users on using the FX Drafts application.
Related Information

Form 9182

END
